DESIGNVERSE
2026
HACKATHON

A 4-day design challenge to solve real-world problems through research, empathy, and creative design thinking.

4-DAY JOURNEY PROGRAM
DAY 01
  • Speaker Session & Meetups
  • Problem Statement Reveal
DAY 02
  • Design Lab Opens • Live Work Loop
  • Mentorship & Guidance Sessions
DAY 03
  • Submit Your Design Solution
  • Finalist Selection Announcements
DAY 04
  • Live Presentation & Q&A With Judges
  • Winners Crowned

Excel engine initialized — ready to export or import
Teams Sheet
Members Sheet

📤 Export — Admin → Excel
Downloads all current admin data (teams, members, event codes, login timestamps) as a structured .xlsx file with three organized sheets.
Output: designverse_hackathon_data.xlsx
Sheets: Teams • Members • Event_Codes
📥 Import — Excel → Admin
Upload a previously exported (or manually edited) Excel file to sync all changes back into the admin panel. Follows the same sheet structure.
Drop .xlsx here or click to browse
Accepts: designverse_hackathon_data.xlsx
Sheet 1 — Teams
Sheet 2 — Members
Sheet 3 — Event Codes
